items.titleZh: De'Anthony Melton与勇士达成两年，1100万美元合同
items.summary: The Golden State Warriors and De'Anthony Melton have agreed to a two-year, $11 million deal with a player option in Year 2. Melton appeared in 49 games with the Warriors last season after returning from a torn ACL, averaging 12.3 points, 3.2 rebounds, 2.6 assists and 1.6 steals in 23.0 minutes. Melton is represented by Joe Smith , Thaddeus Foucher and Aaron Klevan .

items.title: Jaylen Brown Not Seeking Trade As Celtics Motivated To Find Deal
items.originalTitle: Jaylen Brown Not Seeking Trade As Celtics Motivated To Find Deal
items.headlineZh: 凯尔特人相关动态：自由市场与合同情况继续更新
items.titleZh: 凯尔特人相关动态：自由市场与合同情况继续更新
items.summary: The Boston Celtics have been actively shopping guard Jaylen Brown, soliciting offers from roughly eight to 10 teams over the past several days, according to ESPN's Shams Charania. Brown has not requested or signaled a preference for a trade, with the push coming entirely from the front office. Charania made the comments Wednesday on ESPN's First Take, noting that Boston has set a high asking price throughout the process. "Sources tell me the Celtics have actually started strongly shopping Jaylen Brown, soliciting offers from a market of about 8 to 10 teams in the last several days," said Charania. "It's unclear whether a deal is close or where they necessarily stand, but there's been a high price threshold that the Celtics have set from the outset of any type of a Jaylen Brown trade. "We know a couple weeks ago they offered Jaylen Brown and two first-round picks for Giannis Antetokounmpo, so clearly they would be willing to move him for a premium player. Is there a player like Giannis out there right now in the market? Probably not. So then you turn your attention to a package of draft capital. And so, they have asked some teams for at least four first-round picks. Clearly, no deal done yet. "And just to be clear here, this is the organization choosing to put Jaylen Brown's name out there among teams. My understanding is Jaylen Brown has not requested a trade. This is not something that he has advocated for. So, think about it: if you're Jaylen Brown, you just won Finals MVP in 2024, you're an MVP finalist this past season, and the Celtics are now working to try to move Jaylen Brown." Brian Windhorst said he expects Boston to continue pursuing a trade for Brown regardless of how the situation initially resolves, even suggesting the guard could be shopped again later if he starts the season with the team. "So, what we've come to understand was the Celtics weren't trying to get Giannis Antetokounmpo and realizing, 'Boy, we have to give up Jaylen Brown to get him,'" said Windhorst. "They've decided that they're trading Jaylen Brown, and they just decided to offer him for Giannis Antetokounmpo. You've got to focus on it the other way. They've decided they're done with him, and so no, I don't think they're going to keep him. I think they're going to do everything they possibly can to trade him, and that's what their actions are showing here. "Their actions are showing that not only are they motivated to trade him, they're not even focused on trading him for a package of players. Like, you know, it'd be one thing if you thought, 'Look, he replicates Tatum a little bit too much. Tatum's coming off this injury, and we had to thin out our big man position, so we just need to reallocate our resources. So, let's look for two really good players.' That's not what they're doing. "They're asking for draft picks. They're basically saying, even if we have to take a step back as an organization and hold onto these draft picks and either use them to get young players or package them for a trade later, even if we have to take a step back, that is more preferable right now to bringing Jaylen Brown back. That's what their actions are saying. "And so, no, I do think that there is a pathway and a possibility that they don't find a trade, because you're talking about 40 cents, whether it's 40 cents or 60 cents on the dollar, you can't do a trade like that with a player in his prime. So, I do think there's a possibility that they don't find a trade and we get into the season, and maybe there's some uncomfortable weeks or months. But Jaylen Brown is not going to be a long-term Celtic. One way or another, he's on his way out of town. They've decided that, and it's kind of fascinating to see how this has played out." Despite the Celtics' efforts to find a trade, there doesn't appear to be any traction towards a deal at this time.

items.headlineZh: Collin Sexton与湖人达成两年，1900万美元合同
items.titleZh: Collin Sexton与湖人达成两年，1900万美元合同
items.summary: Collin Sexton and the Los Angeles Lakers have agreed to a two-year, $19 million deal in free agency. Sexton will have a player option for the 2027-28 season. Sexton appeared in 68 games last season with the Charlotte Hornets and Chicago Bulls, averaging 15.4 points, 2.3 rebounds and 3.3 assists in 23.7 minutes in his age-26 season. Sexton is represented by Austin Brown and Max Saidman .
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Collin Sexton与湖人达成两年，1900万美元合同。

items.originalTitle: Quentin Grimes, Lakers Agree To Four-Year, $60M Deal
items.headlineZh: Quentin Grimes与湖人达成四年，6000万美元合同
items.titleZh: Quentin Grimes与湖人达成四年，6000万美元合同
items.summary: Quentin Grimes and the Los Angeles Lakers have agreed to a four-year, $60 million deal with a player option for Year 4. Grimes played the 2025-26 season under the qualifying offer with the Philadelphia 76ers after he was unable to secure a long-term deal in restricted free agency. Grimes previously played alongside Luka Doncic with the Dallas Mavericks. In 75 games last season, Grimes averaged 13.4 points, 3.6 rebounds and 3.3 assists in 29.4 minutes for the Sixers. Grimes is represented by Austin Brown and Steven Heumann .
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Quentin Grimes与湖人达成四年，6000万美元合同。

items.titleZh: Sandro Mamukelashvili与湖人达成四年，5200万美元合同
items.summary: Sandro Mamukelashvili and the Los Angeles Lakers have agreed to a four-year, $52 million deal with a player option in Year 4 and is fully guaranteed. Mamukelashvili appeared in 80 games last season with the Toronto Raptors, averaging 11.2 points, 4.9 rebounds and 1.9 assists in 21.9 minutes. Mamukelashvili also shot 38.9 percent on three-pointers.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Sandro Mamukelashvili与湖人达成四年，5200万美元合同。

items.title: Walker Kessler From Jazz To Lakers In Four-Year, $130M Sign-And-Trade For Two FRPs, Two Swaps
items.originalTitle: Walker Kessler From Jazz To Lakers In Four-Year, $130M Sign-And-Trade For Two FRPs, Two Swaps
items.headlineZh: 湖人相关动态：自由市场与合同情况继续更新
items.titleZh: 湖人相关动态：自由市场与合同情况继续更新
items.summary: Walker Kessler has agreed to join the Los Angeles Lakers on a four-year, $130 million sign-and-trade that will send unprotected first round picks in 2031 and 2033 along with first round pick swaps in 2028 and 2030 to the Utah Jazz. The Jazz were expected to match any offer sheet Kessler signed in restricted free agency, which led to the negotiation of a sign-and-trade with Utah getting significant draft capital back in return. Utah offered a five-year, $150 million contract to Kessler. The Lakers entered the offseason with up to five tradeable first round picks and now only have one left with their 2032 swap available. Kessler appeared in just five games last season due to a torn labrum i his left shoulder in November. During the 2024-25 season, Kessler averaged 11.1 points, 12.2 rebounds, 1.7 assists and 2.4 blocks in 30.0 minutes across 58 games. Kessler was originally acquired by the Jazz in the 2022 Rudy Gobert trade as this further adds to Utah's draft haul originating from that deal with the Minnesota Timberwolves. The Jazz re-signed Jusuf Nurkic this offseason on a two-year, $22 million deal and will give the team depth at center. Kessler is represented by Aaron Mintz , Houston Kessler and Dave Spahn . The Lakers are now expected to reach agreements with Sandro Mamukelashvili and Quentin Grimes.
items.oneLineZh: 湖人相关动态：自由市场与合同情况继续更新

items.titleZh: Mitchell Robinson与凯尔特人达成三年，4740万美元合同
items.summary: Mitchell Robinson and the Boston Celtics have agreed to a three-year, $47.4 million contract with a player option in Year 3. The Celtics have prioritized adding size to their team and they do so by signing Robinson away from the New York Knicks. Robinson will be signed by the Celtics using their non-taxpayer midlevel exception. Robinson appeared in 60 games last season with the Celtics, averaging 5.7 points, 8.8 rebounds and 1.2 blocks in 19.6 minutes.

items.titleZh: Norman Powell相关动态：自由市场与合同情况继续更新
items.summary: Add Norman Powell to the list of this past season's All-Stars who are changing addresses this summer in NBA free agency. Powell has agreed to a two-year deal that could be worth up to $45 million with the Chicago Bulls, a person with knowledge of the talks said Wednesday. Powell also had received some interest from the Detroit Pistons, said the person, who spoke to The Associated Press on condition of anonymity because the contract cannot be finalized until July 6 at the earliest.

items.headlineZh: Mike Conley Jr.与凯尔特人达成一年合同
items.titleZh: Mike Conley Jr.与凯尔特人达成一年合同
items.summary: Mike Conley Jr. and the Boston Celtics have agreed to a one-year deal. Conley has spent the past three-plus seasons with the Minnesota Timberwolves. Last season, Conley averaged 4.5 points, 1.7 rebounds and 2.9 assists in 18.4 minutes. Conley will play a part time role with the Celtics behind Derrick White and Payton Pritchard, but is considered one of the NBA's best veteran leaders.

items.title: Norman Powell, Bulls Agree To Two-Year, $45M Contract
items.originalTitle: Norman Powell, Bulls Agree To Two-Year, $45M Contract
items.headlineZh: 交易动态：Norman Powell，公牛 达成 两年，4500万美元 合同
items.titleZh: 交易动态：Norman Powell，公牛 达成 两年，4500万美元 合同
items.summary: The Chicago Bulls and guard Norman Powell have agreed to a two-year, $45 million contract. This will use up most of Chicago's remaining cap space. Powell was a first-time All-Star for the Miami Heat last season. The 33-year-old shooting guard averaged 21.7 points, 3.5 rebounds, 2.5 assists and 1.1 steals per game. Powell shot 47% from the field, including 38% on three-pointers. Powell was traded to Miami ahead of last season from the LA Clippers. In addition to the Heat and Clippers, Powell has also played for the Toronto Raptors and Portland Trail Blazers in his 11-year NBA career.
items.dekZh: 芝加哥公牛与后卫 Norman Powell达成两年，4500万美元合同。

items.title: Jazz Guarantee Contracts For Kyle Filipowski, Svi Mykhailiuk
items.originalTitle: Jazz Guarantee Contracts For Kyle Filipowski, Svi Mykhailiuk
items.headlineZh: 爵士相关动态：自由市场与合同情况继续更新
items.titleZh: 爵士相关动态：自由市场与合同情况继续更新
items.summary: The Utah Jazz fully guaranteed the contracts for big man Kyle Filipowski and wing Svi Mykhailiuk for the 2026-27 season. Filipowski will hit the books at $3 million. Mykhailiuk will count at $3.85 million. In his second NBA season, Filipowski averaged 11.4 points, 7.2 rebounds and 2.6 assists. With the Jazz dealing with injuries at the center spot, Filipowski started in 41 of the 77 games he played last season. Mykhailiuk is valued as a stay-ready veteran off the bench. Despite an inconsistent role, the veteran wing shooter averaged 9.4 points on 48% shooting, including 41% on three-pointers.

items.title: Clippers Guarantee Kris Dunn; Push Back Guarantee Date For Cam Christie
items.originalTitle: Clippers Guarantee Kris Dunn; Push Back Guarantee Date For Cam Christie
items.headlineZh: 快船相关动态：球队后续动向值得关注
items.titleZh: 快船相关动态：球队后续动向值得关注
items.summary: The LA Clippers have fully guaranteed the $5.7 million contract for guard Kris Dunn. The Clippers and Cam Christie agreed to amend the guarantee date for his $2.3 million contract. LA and Christie pushed that date back from June 30 to July 20. Dunn appeared in all 82 games (68 starts) for the Clippers last season. The veteran guard averaged 7.3 points, 3.3 rebounds, 3.6 assists and 1.6 steals. Dunn has become a consistent three-pointer shooter, in addition to being one of the top perimeter defenders in the NBA.

items.title: John Collins, Pistons Agree To Three-Year, $51M Contract
items.originalTitle: John Collins, Pistons Agree To Three-Year, $51M Contract
items.headlineZh: 签约动态：John Collins，活塞 达成 三年，5100万美元 合同
items.titleZh: 签约动态：John Collins，活塞 达成 三年，5100万美元 合同
items.summary: The Detroit Pistons have agreed to a three-year, $51 million contract with forward John Collins. Adding Collins gives the Pistons a veteran big man who can finish around the rim, as well as provide floor spacing for Cade Cunningham. In 69 games with the LA Clippers last season, Collins averaged 13.6 points and 5.3 rebounds in 27.1 minutes per game. The 28-year-old forward shot 55.2% from the field, including 40.6% on 3.2 three-point attempts per game. Collins played the first six years of his NBA career with the Atlanta Hawks. He then spent two years with the Utah Jazz before playing for the Clippers last season.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，签约动态：John Collins，活塞 达成 三年，5100万美元 合同。

items.summary: The Chicago Bulls have waived guard Kam Jones. The Bulls will eat a guarantee of just more than $1 million in dead salary for Jones for the 2026-27 season. Chicago acquired Jones as part of a draft-day swap with the Indiana Pacers. The Bulls acquired cash and the right to swap two future second-round picks, while the Pacers landed the draft rights for Braden Smith.

items.title: Kristaps Porzingis Eligible To Be Traded Immediately, Only Has $3M Guaranteed For 2027-28
items.originalTitle: Kristaps Porzingis Eligible To Be Traded Immediately, Only Has $3M Guaranteed For 2027-28
items.headlineZh: Kristaps Porzingis Eligible相关动态：球队继续评估交易与阵容调整
items.titleZh: Kristaps Porzingis Eligible相关动态：球队继续评估交易与阵容调整
items.summary: Kristaps Porzingis signed a two-year, $40 million deal with the Golden State Warriors, but only $3 million is guaranteed for the second season in 2027-28. Porzingis is eligible to be traded immediately because it was an extension with no more than a five percent raise between Year 1 and Year 2. Porzingis also holds a player option for Year 2. The Warriors are active in the market as they pursue LeBron James in free agency. Golden State has also been linked with a trade for Anthony Davis. Porzingis averaged 16.1 points, 5.3 rebounds and 2.3 assists in 23.7 minutes across 15 games with the Warriors. Porzingis shot just 31.1 percent on three-pointers with the Warriors. Porzingis is represented by Jeff Schwartz and Janis Porzingis .

items.title: Jalen Duren Meets With Lakers, Kings; Set For More Talks On Wednesday
items.originalTitle: Jalen Duren Meets With Lakers, Kings; Set For More Talks On Wednesday
items.headlineZh: 湖人相关动态：球队后续动向值得关注
items.titleZh: 湖人相关动态：球队后续动向值得关注
items.summary: Jalen Duren had a productive meeting with the Los Angeles Lakers on Tuesday and is set to meet with the team again Wednesday morning as he pursues his restricted free agency market. The Lakers told Duren in the meeting that they view him as a maximum-salary caliber player, sources said. The Sacramento Kings delivered a similar message of strong interest after also meeting with the 22-year-old center on Tuesday, indicating they will continue exploring sign-and-trade scenarios to acquire him. Duren, a third-team All-NBA selection, has been exploring options outside the Detroit Pistons after finding the Pistons' offer underwhelming. The Pistons have signaled in recent days that they intend to match any offer sheet or decline to cooperate on a sign-and-trade. Detroit has specifically shown no interest in a sign-and-trade with Sacramento that would have sent Domantas Sabonis to the Pistons. Duren had a breakout season as the Pistons finished the regular season as the No. 1 seed in the Eastern Conference, but he struggled in the playoffs against the Orlando Magic and Cleveland Cavaliers and has contributed to the gap in his value with his incumbent franchise. The Lakers suddenly have significant salary-cap flexibility after LeBron James informed the team Tuesday that he will not return next season. That opens the door for Los Angeles to pursue Duren as a frontcourt complement to franchise centerpiece Luka Doncic for the long-term. The Lakers are also in talks with Walker Kessler, who is also a restricted free agent center. Duren would also serve as a key building block for Sacramento, which selected Arkansas point guard Darius Acuff Jr. with the seventh overall pick in this year's draft as it looks to reshape its roster core.
items.oneLineZh: 湖人相关动态：球队后续动向值得关注

items.title: Warriors Planning Additional Moves To Open Cap Space If LeBron James Shows Interest In Signing
items.originalTitle: Warriors Planning Additional Moves To Open Cap Space If LeBron James Shows Interest In Signing
items.headlineZh: 勇士若追LeBron James，将继续腾薪资空间
items.titleZh: 勇士若追LeBron James，将继续腾薪资空间
items.summary: The Golden State Warriors are planning additional moves to gain more cap flexibility if LeBron James shows interest in signing with the team, sources told Marc Stein and Jake Fischer of The People's Insider. The Warriors, Cavs, and Heat are the leading contenders to sign James. It is expected that over a dozen teams will pursue James. The Warriors ended trade talks for Anthony Davis and are focused on adding James to the roster. With the team holding onto Al Horford and Kristaps Porzingis, Quinten Post is reportedly generating interest around the league.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，如果LeBron James有意加盟，金州勇士计划继续操作，以腾出更多薪资空间。勇士、骑士和热火被视为签下James的主要竞争者。
items.oneLineZh: 勇士若追LeBron James，将继续腾薪资空间

items.title: Multiple Bids For NBA Europe Franchises Top $1 Billion
items.originalTitle: Multiple Bids For NBA Europe Franchises Top $1 Billion
items.headlineZh: NBA欧洲联赛多个球队竞标价超过10亿美元
items.titleZh: NBA欧洲联赛多个球队竞标价超过10亿美元
items.summary: Over 20 groups placed bids to participate in NBA Europe, with multiple bids topping $1 billion in select markets, sources told Ben Golliver of ESPN. NBA Europe plans to launch in 2027 in 12 markets including London, Paris, Madrid, Berlin, Munich, Milan, Rome and Istanbul. "We're extremely encouraged by the final bids we received for permanent franchises in a new NBA and FIBA-backed league in Europe, which reflect the tremendous interest and momentum around this project," NBA deputy commissioner Mark Tatum said in a statement Tuesday. "This will be the biggest influx of capital European basketball has ever seen, and we have clear frontrunners in each of our 12 target cities." NBA Europe plans to have 12 permanent teams and four open spots filled by a promotion system. Several existing EuroLeague teams also reportedly put forth bids
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，NBA欧洲联赛多个球队竞标价超过10亿美元。
items.oneLineZh: NBA欧洲联赛多个球队竞标价超过10亿美元

items.originalTitle: Bogdan Bogdanovic, Rockets Agree To One-Year Deal
items.headlineZh: Bogdan Bogdanovic与火箭达成一年合同
items.titleZh: Bogdan Bogdanovic与火箭达成一年合同
items.summary: The Houston Rockets signed Bogdan Bogdanovic to a one-year contract at the veteran's minimum, sources told Shams Charania of ESPN. Bogdanovic became a free agent after the Clippers declined their $16 million option on his contract. The 33-year-old most recently played for the Clippers, averaging 7.4 points and 2.6 rebounds last season. Bogdanovic played in just 77 games over the past two seasons due to injuries. Bogdanovic gives the Rockets a perimeter shooter with size that can also handle the ball on the wing.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Bogdan Bogdanovic与火箭达成一年合同。
items.oneLineZh: Bogdan Bogdanovic与火箭达成一年合同

items.title: Lakers Expected To Sign Sandro Mamukelashvili, Quentin Grimes; Continue Pursuit Of Walker Kessler
items.originalTitle: Lakers Expected To Sign Sandro Mamukelashvili, Quentin Grimes; Continue Pursuit Of Walker Kessler
items.headlineZh: 湖人预计签下Sandro Mamukelashvili和Quentin Grimes
items.titleZh: 湖人预计签下Sandro Mamukelashvili和Quentin Grimes
items.summary: The Los Angeles Lakers are expected to eventually secure free agent agreements with Sandro Mamukelashvili and Quentin Grimes. The Lakers are also still pursuing Walker Kessler as their top target this offseason as they look to upgrade the center position. Kessler is a restricted free agent and would either need to reach agreement with the Utah Jazz on a sign-and-trade, or risk signing him to an offer sheet that can be matched. Kessler is represented by Aaron Mintz , Houston Kessler and Dave Spahn . The Jazz have been expected to try to retain Kessler this offseason. Mamukelashvili is receiving considerable interest on the open market and has been expected to command more than $10 million per season. Mamukelashvili averaged 11.2 points, 4.9 rebounds and 1.9 assists in 21.9 minutes over 80 games in his one season with the Toronto Raptors. Mamukelashvili is represented by George Roussakis . Grimes averaged 13.4 points, 3.6 rebounds and 3.3 assists in 29.4 minutes with the Philadelphia 76ers over 75 games. Grimes played the season on a one-year qualifying offer after being unable to secure a longer deal as a restricted free agent. Grimes is represented by Austin Brown and Steven Heumann . Grimes is also expected to sign with the Lakers on a contract that starts around $10 million in Year 1.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，洛杉矶湖人预计将与Sandro Mamukelashvili和Quentin Grimes达成自由球员协议。湖人仍将Walker Kessler视为休赛期重点目标，希望升级中锋位置。
items.oneLineZh: 湖人预计签下Sandro Mamukelashvili和Quentin Grimes

items.title: Dean Wade, Sixers Agree To Four-Year, $39M Deal
items.originalTitle: Dean Wade, Sixers Agree To Four-Year, $39M Deal
items.headlineZh: Dean Wade与76人达成四年，3900万美元合同
items.titleZh: Dean Wade与76人达成四年，3900万美元合同
items.summary: Dean Wade and the Philadelphia 76ers have agreed to a four-year, $39 million deal. The Sixers are using the non-taxpayer midlevel exception to sign Wade and will be hard capped at the first apron. Wade entered the NBA on a two-way contract with the Cleveland Cavaliers during the 2019-20 season. Wade is coming off a three-year, $18.5 million extension signed with the Cavaliers ahead of the 2022-23 season. Last season, Wade averaged 5.8 points, 4.2 rebounds and 1.5 assists in 22.3 minutes. Wade is represented by Adam Papas and Austin Walton . The Sixers hired Mike Gansey away from the Cavaliers as as president of basketball operations this offseason and his first free agent acquisition becomes a player he is familiar with in Wade.
items.dekZh: 76人将使用非纳税人中产特例签下Wade，并受到第一土豪线硬工资帽限制。
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Dean Wade与76人达成四年，3900万美元合同。
items.oneLineZh: Dean Wade与76人达成四年，3900万美元合同
keyPoints: 76人将使用非纳税人中产特例签下Wade，并受到第一土豪线硬工资帽限制。

items.title: Zach Collins, Bulls Agree To Two-Year, $17M Deal
items.originalTitle: Zach Collins, Bulls Agree To Two-Year, $17M Deal
items.headlineZh: Zach Collins与公牛达成两年，1700万美元合同
items.titleZh: Zach Collins与公牛达成两年，1700万美元合同
items.summary: Zach Collins and the Chicago Bulls have agreed to a two-year, $17 million contract. Collins is represented by Mark Bartelstein and Kieran Piller . Collins appeared in just 10 games last season due to a left wrist fracture and a sprained toe. Collins averaged 9.7 points, 5.6 rebounds and 1.5 assists in 18.4 minutes.
items.dekZh: Collins上赛季因左手腕骨折和脚趾扭伤只出战10场。
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Zach Collins与公牛达成两年，1700万美元合同。

keyPoints: Collins上赛季因左手腕骨折和脚趾扭伤只出战10场。

items.title: Luke Kennard, Suns Agree To Two-Year, $13M Deal
items.originalTitle: Luke Kennard, Suns Agree To Two-Year, $13M Deal
items.headlineZh: Luke Kennard与太阳达成两年，1300万美元合同
items.titleZh: Luke Kennard与太阳达成两年，1300万美元合同
items.summary: Luke Kennard and the Phoenix Suns have agreed to a two-year, $13 million deal. Kennard finished the 2025-26 season with the Los Angeles Lakers following his trade from the Atlanta Hawks. In 32 regular season games with the Lakers, Kennard averaged 9.0 points, 2.6 rebounds and 2.4 assists while shooting 44.8 percent on three-pointers. In 10 playoff games, Kennard averaged 11.5 points, 3.5 rebounds and 2.3 assists while shooting 47.4 percent on three-pointers. The Suns have already had an active offseason with agreements for Collin Gillespie, Mark Williams and Jordan Goodwin, along with a trade with the Charlotte Hornets for Miles Bridges. Kennard is repressed by Aaron Mintz , Steven Heumann and Dave Spahn .
items.dekZh: Kennard在2025-26赛季末效力于洛杉矶湖人，此前由亚特兰大老鹰交易而来。
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Luke Kennard与太阳达成两年，1300万美元合同。
items.oneLineZh: Luke Kennard与太阳达成两年，1300万美元合同
keyPoints: Kennard在2025-26赛季末效力于洛杉矶湖人，此前由亚特兰大老鹰交易而来。

items.title: Keon Ellis, Nets Agree To Two-Year, $18M Deal
items.originalTitle: Keon Ellis, Nets Agree To Two-Year, $18M Deal
items.headlineZh: Keon Ellis与篮网达成两年，1800万美元合同
items.titleZh: Keon Ellis与篮网达成两年，1800万美元合同
items.summary: Keon Ellis and the Brooklyn Nets have agreed to a two-year, $18 million deal with a mutual option for Year 2. If either side exercises the option, then Ellis will be under contract for the 2027-28 season. The Cleveland Cavaliers acquired Ellis at the trade deadline from the Sacramento Kings. In 72 games with the Cavaliers and Kings last season, Ellis averaged 6.7 points, 1.9 rebounds, 1.0 assists and 1.2 steals in 20.5 minutes. Ellis went undrafted in 2022 out of Alabama and was immediately signed to a two-way contract by the Kings.
items.dekZh: Ellis上赛季为骑士和国王出战72场，场均6.7分，1.9篮板，1.0助攻和1.2抢断，出场20.5分钟。
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Keon Ellis与篮网达成两年，1800万美元合同。
items.oneLineZh: Keon Ellis与篮网达成两年，1800万美元合同
keyPoints: Ellis上赛季为骑士和国王出战72场，场均6.7分，1.9篮板，1.0助攻和1.2抢断，出场20.5分钟。

items.title: Jaylen Brown To Cavaliers With LeBron James Following Concept Floated By Brian Windhorst
items.originalTitle: Jaylen Brown To Cavaliers With LeBron James Following Concept Floated By Brian Windhorst
items.headlineZh: 克利夫兰骑士或先追Jaylen Brown，再签LeBron James
items.titleZh: 克利夫兰骑士或先追Jaylen Brown，再签LeBron James
items.summary: On ESPN's free agency special, Brian Windhorst floated the possibility of the Cleveland Cavaliers trading for Jaylen Brown and then signing LeBron James in free agency. Windhorst has suggested that James' free agency decision could be influenced by the types of moves his suitors make this offseason. The Boston Celtics have been engaged in trade talks involving Brown and could have interest in a trade with the Cavaliers for Evan Mobley. The Celtics would like to add more size to their team and Mobley would give them an All-NBA caliber player back in return for Brown. "That's the type of move you're going to do to get LeBron James' attention," said Windhorst. Earlier on Tuesday during an appearance on ESPN Cleveland, Windhorst said the Cavaliers were working on a trade that he didn't want to disclose at that time. "They are working on trades, I'm not going to tell you who they're working on because I can't deal with it in my life," said Windhorst .
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Brian Windhorst提出设想：克利夫兰骑士可以先交易得到Jaylen Brown，再在自由市场签下LeBron James。
items.oneLineZh: 克利夫兰骑士或先追Jaylen Brown，再签LeBron James

items.title: NBA Projects Salary Cap Growth To Slow To 5.5 Percent In 2027-28 At $174M
items.originalTitle: NBA Projects Salary Cap Growth To Slow To 5.5 Percent In 2027-28 At $174M
items.headlineZh: NBA预计2027-28赛季工资帽增速放缓至5.5%，工资帽约为17400万美元
items.titleZh: NBA预计2027-28赛季工资帽增速放缓至5.5%，工资帽约为17400万美元
items.summary: The NBA projects its salary cap will rise just 5.5 percent in 2027-28, reaching approximately $174 million, with the second apron projected at $234 million, according to a memo distributed to teams Tuesday. The slower growth follows a 6.669 percent increase for the upcoming 2026-27 season, which analysts attribute in part to the league's deteriorating local television revenue situation. The 2026-27 cap has been set at $164.961 million, a gain of $10.314 million over the prior year. The first apron sits at $209.015 million and the second apron at $221.686 million for the new league year. The NBA recorded $11.676 billion in basketball-related income during the 2025-26 season. Seven teams paid luxury tax during the 2025-26 season, combining for $223.11 million in total payments. Half of that figure entered revenue sharing, with each of the remaining 23 non-taxpaying teams receiving $4.85 million in distributions. The Cleveland Cavaliers carried the largest individual tax burden at $68.671 million, finishing as the only team in the second apron. The Golden State Warriors will pay $67.91 million as a repeater taxpayer. The New York Knicks owe $44.44 million after finishing $19.5 million over the tax line. The Los Angeles Lakers, Houston Rockets, Los Angeles Clippers and Minnesota Timberwolves also finished as luxury tax payers for the 2025-26 season.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，NBA预计2027-28赛季工资帽增速放缓至5.5%，工资帽约为17400万美元。
items.oneLineZh: NBA预计2027-28赛季工资帽增速放缓至5.5%，工资帽约为17400万美元

items.title: Kobe Sanders, Clippers Agree To Four-Year, $11.2M Deal
items.originalTitle: Kobe Sanders, Clippers Agree To Four-Year, $11.2M Deal
items.headlineZh: Kobe Sanders与快船达成四年，1120万美元合同
items.titleZh: Kobe Sanders与快船达成四年，1120万美元合同
items.summary: Kobe Sanders and the Los Angeles Clippers have agreed to a four-year, $11.2 million deal in restricted free agency. The first two seasons are guaranteed and the third and fourth are non-guaranteed. Sanders is represented by Ramon Sessions . Sanders averaged 7.3 points, 2.2 rebounds and 1.6 assists in 19.9 minutes across 68 games. The Clippers converted Sanders from a two-way contract to a standard NBA contract in February.
items.dekZh: Sanders场均7.3分，2.2篮板和1.6助攻 在19.9分钟 across 68场。
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Kobe Sanders与快船达成四年，1120万美元合同。
items.oneLineZh: Kobe Sanders与快船达成四年，1120万美元合同
keyPoints: Sanders场均7.3分，2.2篮板和1.6助攻 在19.9分钟 across 68场。
